trends.headline: Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask in Cotton Candy is BeautyTok's limited-edition summer lip drop
trends.body: The cult overnight lip mask is surging again on the back of its limited-edition Cotton Candy scent, with creators doing 'lips before and after one night' reveals and ranking it against the original Berry. Creator angle: a 'I wore the new Cotton Candy lip mask for a week — soft lips test' diary, or a 'viral lip masks tier list' pitting it against Summer Fridays and Rhode.

trends.headline: Boho revival is FashionTok's flea-market-romantic summer aesthetic
trends.body: The bohemian 'gypsy vibe' is back for summer 2026 — vintage jackets, flowy layers, fringe and earthy prints styled like a lucky thrift find rather than a planned outfit. Creator angle: a 'boho summer thrift haul try-on' reel, or a 'styling one vintage waistcoat 4 boho ways' lookbook.

trends.headline: Crochet tops are FashionTok's texture-forward summer layering piece
trends.body: Crochet tops, textured knits and lightweight woven fabrics are all over the feed, adding instant visual interest over swimwear or a simple tank. Creator angle: a 'how to style a crochet top 3 ways (beach to dinner)' reel, or a 'cheap vs splurge crochet top' try-on comparison.

trends.headline: Kool-Aid Pineapples are FoodTok's sweet-and-icy summer snack of the moment
trends.body: The hollowed-pineapple-soaked-in-Kool-Aid snack launched mid-May and is spreading fast as a bright, frozen, kid-friendly summer treat creators slice open on camera. Creator angle: a 'Kool-Aid pineapple — does it actually taste good?' taste test, or a 'frozen summer fruit snacks ranked' build video.

trends.headline: 'Fibermaxxing' is FoodTok's gut-health recipe trend creators are cooking around
trends.body: The push to max out daily fiber with beans, chia, broccoli and oats is everywhere, with creators building high-fiber bowls, overnight chia jars and 'fiber-maxxed' lunches. Creator angle: a 'what I eat in a day to hit 40g of fiber' recipe run, or a 'high-fiber girl dinner' board — keep it about food, not medical claims.

trends.headline: Dance-cardio workouts to the summer's hit sounds are FitTok's fun-first format
trends.body: Creators are turning the season's viral audios — the 'Like a Prayer' remix and Ariana Grande's 'hate that i made u love me' choreo — into follow-along dance-cardio routines that frame exercise as a party, not a chore. Creator angle: a '15-minute dance cardio to the songs you can't stop hearing' follow-along, or a 'I did dance workouts for a week instead of the gym' diary.

trends.headline: 'Whimsy summer' is HomeTok's playful, romanticize-everything decor mood
trends.body: With #whimsy past 321K posts, creators are leaning into analogue revival and playful escapism — fairy lights, mismatched florals, ribbon, candles and 'romanticize your space' corners. Creator angle: a 'turn one shelf into a whimsy summer corner for under $30' styling how-to, or a 'whimsy summer room refresh' transformation.

trends.headline: Handheld misting fans are TechTok's sub-$30 heat-wave gadget
trends.body: The rechargeable handheld fan with an ultrasonic atomizer that sprays a cooling mist (without soaking you) is going viral in heat-wave clips and 'summer bag essentials' hauls. Creator angle: a 'does the misting fan actually keep you cool?' field test outside, or a 'summer gadgets under $30 I actually carry' roundup.

trends.headline: JellyCAP water bottle toppers are ParentTok's on-the-go toddler hydration buy
trends.body: The silicone caps ($14.99 for a set of three) snap onto a regular bottle to turn it into a spill-resistant toddler sipper, and moms are showing them off as a cheap summer-outing hack. Creator angle: a 'toddler summer bag essentials' haul, or a 'JellyCAP vs a regular sippy cup — the mess test' demo.

trends.headline: The AquaPurr water fountain is PetTok's 386M-view fix for picky-drinking cats
trends.body: The cat water fountain has racked up 386M TikTok views as owners post 'my cat finally drinks water' clips, framing it as a summer-hydration must for fussy felines. Creator angle: a 'will my picky cat actually use it? 7-day test', or a 'cat water fountains ranked for noise, cleaning and flow' review.

trends.headline: 'Grocery store tourism' is TravelTok's quirky, low-cost trip format
trends.body: With ~15% of travelers saying they explore local supermarkets on trips, creators are filming 'I went grocery shopping in [country]' walk-throughs of foreign snacks, packaging and prices. Creator angle: a 'foreign grocery haul — what $20 buys here vs home' breakdown, or a 'weirdest snacks in a [country] supermarket' taste test.

trends.headline: Maximalist colorful ring stacks are JewelryTok's summer 'arm candy' flex
trends.body: Minimalism is fading and bold, mix-and-match colorful rings — stacked across every finger — are the defining summer accessory, often paired with bead and bangle stacks. Creator angle: a 'how to stack colorful rings without it looking cluttered' styling tip, or a 'building a $X colorful ring stack from Etsy' haul.
